case_title: EVELYN MEJIA VS. SURAJ K RAJWANI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-06-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF EVELYN MEJIA IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER KARINA MCMILLIAN-REA. DEFENDANT SURAJ K. RAJWANI IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEJIA, EVELYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ K $2,135.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,235.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
